name: pdf_read
description: Extract text and tables from a local PDF file. For large PDFs use pages='1-5' to limit output, or heading='Market Risk' to extract a named section directly (detected by font-size analysis). Returns available_headings[] when heading is not found.

pages.description: Page range: '1', '1-5', or 'all' (default). Use this to page through large documents.

heading.description: Extract only the section under this heading (case-insensitive partial match, font-size detected). E.g. 'Item 7', 'Market Risk', 'Executive Summary'. Returns available_headings[] if not found.

extract_tables.description: Extract tables alongside text. Default: true.

max_chars.description: Truncate full text at this char count. Default: 50000. Max: 200000.
